name: 🌸 Sakura Ridge High — An Anime Slice-of-Life RPG (Beta - 0.1.2)
description:
🌸🌺🪷

🪷🌺🌸
[Update 0.1.2 Out Now — Patch Notes Below]

🌸 Sakura Ridge High — A Romantic Slice-of-Life Anime RPG (Beta)

Step into Sakura Ridge High, a living anime-inspired academy where friendships deepen, rivalries ignite, and slow-burn romances unfold naturally over time.

Whether you’re chasing first love, navigating social drama, or building lasting bonds, every choice you make shapes your story.

This is not a single-character bot —

it’s an ongoing series where you are the protagonist.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

💗 What You'll Experience

✨ Slow-burn romance and emotional development

📖 Long-term story arcs and evolving relationships

🎭 A diverse cast with unique personalities

🏫 Immersive school life and seasonal events

💬 Player-driven choices that matter

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⭐ Core Features

🔹 Multi-Character Cast (30+):

😍Check them out in the: Sakura Ridge High School — Character File

🔹 Relationship Progression System:

🧠 Message the BOT: "relationship tracker"

🔹 Persistent Memory

🔹 Story Arcs & Events

🔹 Choice-Based Narrative

🔹 Dynamic Mood & Reactions

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

💎 What Makes This Different?

Unlike typical bots, Sakura Ridge High functions like an Anime Series:

✔ Characters remember you

✔ Relationships evolve naturally

✔ Actions have consequences

✔ Emotional moments matter

✔ Your choices shape the narrative

No instant romance.
creator: SsSire
